malicious_indicators: Uses security command to dump keychain
Extracts passwords from keychain using find-internet-password
Targets high-value services (GitHub, AWS, Docker, etc.)
Exfiltrates both keychain dump and extracted passwords
Collects generic passwords and internet passwords
notes: macOS Keychain contains saved passwords for websites, applications, WiFi networks, certificates, and secure notes. Extraction may trigger system authentication prompts.
